it:54.2: This was said by the Blessed One, said by the Arahant, so I have heard:
it:54.3: "There are these three searches. Which three? The search for sensuality, the search for becoming, the search for a holy life. These are the three searches."
it:54.4: Centered, mindful, alert, the Awakened One's disciple discerns searches, how searches come into play, where they cease,
it:54.5: And the path to their ending. With the ending of searches, a monk free of want is totally unbound.
it:54.6: This, too, was the meaning of what was said by the Blessed One, so I have heard.
